title: Rock Hill Woman Killed in Interstate Crash
summary: A 37-year-old Rock Hill woman died in a deadly crash on the interstate.
charlotte_impact: Fatal accidents raise concerns about road safety and traffic management in the Rock Hill area.

title: Man Wanted for Shooting in Crowded Parking Lot
summary: Kings Mountain Police are searching for Ahmad Rashad Leggett Jr. after he allegedly fired shots in a crowded gas station parking lot.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the issue of gun violence and public safety in Kings Mountain.

title: Man Airlifted After Kershaw County Shooting
summary: A man was airlifted to a hospital after being shot outside a home in Lancaster County. The shooting is under investigation.
charlotte_impact: The incident raises concerns about violent crime rates in the Kershaw area.

title: Deadly Crash Under Investigation in West Charlotte
summary: Police are investigating a deadly crash on Yorkmont Road in west Charlotte. Details are still emerging.
charlotte_impact: Another fatal traffic incident underscores the need for safer driving practices.

title: Pedestrian Hospitalized After Being Hit by Vehicle
summary: One person was hospitalized after being hit by a vehicle on Albemarle Road at Hollirose Drive.
charlotte_impact: Pedestrian safety is a growing concern in Charlotte, especially in high-traffic areas.

title: Rain Expected on Easter Sunday
summary: Widespread showers and possible thunderstorms are forecast for Easter Sunday.
charlotte_impact: Weather conditions can affect travel and outdoor activities during the holiday weekend.

title: Pedestrian Killed in Southeast Charlotte Vehicle Crash
summary: A pedestrian was killed after being struck by a vehicle on Krefeld Drive in southeast Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: This incident highlights the dangers pedestrians face on Charlotte roads.

title: Escape the Fate to Preview New Music in Charlotte
summary: Escape the Fate and Lacuna Coil will perform at The Underground on April 26, with Escape the Fate teasing new music.
charlotte_impact: Provides information for local music fans about an upcoming concert.

title: Child Airlifted After Accident with Construction Equipment
summary: A child was airlifted to a Winston-Salem hospital after being hit by construction equipment in Burke County.
charlotte_impact: Accidents involving children and heavy machinery raise safety concerns at construction sites.

title: Charlotte SHOUT! Returns to Uptown
summary: Charlotte SHOUT! is back in Uptown, offering 17 days of art, music, and community events.
charlotte_impact: Promotes community engagement and cultural experiences in Charlotte.

title: Union County Teacher Accused of Child Sex Crime
summary: Zackary Wayne Winchester, an art teacher, is charged with indecent liberties with a minor.
charlotte_impact: This is a serious allegation that erodes trust in educational institutions.

title: Corey Heim Wins NASCAR Truck Race at Rockingham
summary: Corey Heim dominates the NASCAR truck series race at Rockingham, securing his second win of 2026.
charlotte_impact: Sports news relevant to racing fans in the Rockingham area.

title: Rising Gas Prices Impact Feeding Charlotte Volunteers
summary: Higher fuel costs are limiting food pickups and deliveries for Feeding Charlotte, a local nonprofit.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates the impact of economic factors on community support systems.

title: Father and Son's Journey with Autism
summary: A story about a father learning to connect with his son who has autism.
charlotte_impact: Promotes understanding and empathy towards individuals with autism and their families.

title: Hickory Police Shoot and Kill Man Firing at Cars
summary: A person was shot and killed by a Hickory police officer after firing at passing cars.
charlotte_impact: Raises questions about police use of force and public safety in Hickory.
